# Triage Report: apex_participation_matches_participation_fact_enriched_12

## Error Details
- **Test**: apex_participation_matches_participation_fact_enriched_12
- **DAG**: monitor__severe_tests__hourly
- **Error**: Got 436168 results, configured to fail if != 0

## Failure History
- 7 failures in last 7 days (recurring)
- Last success: 2026-03-05

## Root Cause
Known lag in experimentation pipeline causes participation count mismatch. Experimentation team is aware and monitors independently.

## Resolution
- Type: recommend_suppression
- Actions: Exclude from critical AE alerting, experimentation team handles directly
- Tag: @kavya.jain
